# 3 hospitalized in Chesterfield shopping center crash

**TL;DR:** A vehicle crashed into a Chesterfield shopping center and struck multiple cars, sending three people to hospitals.

A vehicle crashed into a shopping center in Chesterfield County, striking multiple parked or occupied vehicles. Three people were injured in the incident and transported to hospitals for treatment. Emergency responders attended to the scene and investigated the cause.

**Why it matters:** Shopping center accidents can disrupt traffic and service access for Chesterfield residents, and raise awareness about vehicle safety in busy commercial areas.
